---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear description of what went wrong.

**To reproduce**
1. …
2. …

**Expected behaviour**
What you expected to happen.

**Actual behaviour / error message**
Paste the banner/dialog text. Relevant lines from
`%APPDATA%\SecureFileEncryptorPro\secure_file_encryptor.log` help a lot.
**Never paste passwords or file contents.**

**Environment**
- OS: (e.g. Windows 11)
- Python: (`python --version`)
- App version: (Help → About)

> ⚠ If this is a **security vulnerability**, do NOT open an issue — see [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md).
